payload.label: clock
payload.long_description: Partial, slightly blurred round wall clock with a dark scalloped wood or wood-like frame, white face printed with black Roman numerals and minute ticks, thin black hour and minute hands plus a thinner central second hand; lower-right edge of the clock is cut off in the crop, estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.
